titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَتْرُكُ وَارِثَيْنِ أَحَدُهُمَا حُرٌّ وَ الْآخَرُ مَمْلُوكٌ
titles.en: Chapter 42 – The man leaves two inheritors, one of them a free, and the other a slave

titles.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يَتْرُكُ وَارِثَيْنِ أَحَدُهُمَا حُرٌّ وَ الْآخَرُ مَمْلُوكٌ
titles.en: Chapter 42 – The man leaves two inheritors, one of them a free, and the other a slave

segments: عَبْدٍ مُسْلِمٍ وَ لَهُ أُمٌّ نَصْرَانِيَّةٌ وَ لِلْعَبْدِ ابْنٌ حُرٌّ قِيلَ أَ رَأَيْتَ إِنْ مَاتَتْ أُمُّ الْعَبْدِ وَ تَرَكَتْ مَالًا قَالَ يَرِثُهُ ابْنُ ابْنِهَا الْحُرُّ .
arabic.text: عَبْدٍ مُسْلِمٍ وَ لَهُ أُمٌّ نَصْرَانِيَّةٌ وَ لِلْعَبْدِ ابْنٌ حُرٌّ قِيلَ أَ رَأَيْتَ إِنْ مَاتَتْ أُمُّ الْعَبْدِ وَ تَرَكَتْ مَالًا قَالَ يَرِثُهُ ابْنُ ابْنِهَا الْحُرُّ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassa Bin Mahboub, from Abu Ayoub, from Mahzam,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding a Muslim slave, and for him is a Christian mother, and for the slave is a free son. It was said, ‘What is your<sup>asws</sup> view if the mother of the slave dies and leaves wealth?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It would be inherited by the son of her son, the free (grandson)’.
en.hubeali.text:
Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassa Bin Mahboub, from Abu Ayoub, from Mahzam,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> regarding a Muslim slave, and for him is a Christian mother, and for the slave is a free son. It was said, ‘What is your<sup>asws</sup> view if the mother of the slave dies and leaves wealth?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘It would be inherited by the son of her son, the free (grandson)’.

segments: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Mahbub from abu Ayyub from Mehzam who has narrated the following: “About the case of a slave who is a Muslim and has a Christian mother and a free son, it was asked what happens if the mother of the slave dies leaving a certain amount of assets, abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, said, ‘Her free grandson inherits it.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Mahbub from abu Ayyub from Mehzam who has narrated the following: “About the case of a slave who is a Muslim and has a Christian mother and a free son, it was asked what happens if the mother of the slave dies leaving a certain amount of assets, abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, said, ‘Her free grandson inherits it.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/224)
gradings.label: مجهول
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/224)

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ أَبِي أَيُّوبَ عَنْ مِهْزَمٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) فِي
